English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Johnnie Parrish papers
Parrish, Johnnie.
6570
2.4 cubic feet. 2.4 cubic feet.
1979-1994. Notes, clippings, publications, videotapes. Files for Focus on Art include notes, clippings, publications, and other background materials for the television shows, compiled by Johnnie Parrish. Also, original videotapes of the shows that included interviews with local artists as well as workshops and gallery openings. Also, alphabetical subject files on art and artists. Copy of Seventeen magazine, July 1953, with article mentioning Priscilla Kiefer (Johnnie Parrish) Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 1 ======= 1 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 5072390
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Aditi Sant
Date completed:
May 21, 2004
EAD encoding:
Aditi Sant, May 21, 2004
Date modified:
Jude Corina, January 2016
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Focus on Art was a weekly cable program, hosted by Priscilla A. (Johnnie) Parrish in Ithaca from 1979 to 1987.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Files for Focus on Art include notes, clippings, publications, and other background materials for the television shows, compiled by Johnnie Parrish. Also, original videotapes of the shows that included interviews with local artists as well as workshops and gallery openings. Also, alphabetical subject files on art and artists.
Copy of Seventeen magazine, July 1953, with article mentioning Priscilla Kiefer (Johnnie Parrish)
RELATED MATERIALS
See also Jason Seley Papers, #15-1-3069
Cite As:
Johnnie Parrish Papers, #6570. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Cable television -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Artists -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Art -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
